surfaces.header: backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#050505]/70 border-b border-white/10 sticky top-0 z-50
surfaces.card_flat: bg-[#0a0a0a] border border-white/10 hover:-translate-y-1 hover:border-white/20 transition-all duration-300
surfaces.button_primary: bg-primary text-black font-bold tracking-wide hover:bg-primary_hover transition-colors
surfaces.button_outline: bg-transparent text-white border border-white/20 hover:border-white/50 transition-colors

image_urls.description: Abstract neon lines for the hero section background to emphasize speed and AI. Apply max bg-black/50 overlay.
AI glowing head abstract for the 'How AI Helps' section background or side visual.
Developer coding laptop shot for the About Us / Expert Devs section.

hero.visuals: Hero image with bg-black/50 overlay. Stark white text. Yellow Primary CTA button.
hero.instructions: Use font-black for H1. Subtitle must be text-xl text-text_secondary. Add a WhatsApp CTA button with outline style.

about.instructions: Contrast the AI speed with human expert imagery. Use the developer coding image. Generous padding.

ai_benefits.instructions: Use Shadcn Cards heavily customized with 'Terminal Look'. Dark background with neon green or yellow 1px borders for AI features.

portfolio.instructions: Mix col-span-8 and col-span-4 to create tension. Show screenshots. Each card must have a visible external link icon and link to a dummy URL.

how_it_works.instructions: 4-step process. Expose the skeleton. border-r border-b border-white/10 on each step. Remove right border on the last item.

contact.instructions: Contact form for quote. Use Shadcn Input, Textarea, Button. Strip border radius (rounded-none). Background black. Form submission should be mocked with a toast notification saying 'Sent to Gmail'.

instructions_to_main_agent: INSTALL FONTS: Ensure Outfit and JetBrains Mono are imported via Google Fonts in index.css.
INSTALL ICONS: Use lucide-react (default) or install @phosphor-icons/react for high-end duotone icons.
TEST IDS: Add data-testid attributes to all interactive elements (e.g., data-testid='hero-cta-button').
COMPONENTS: Use Shadcn UI for form, accordion (FAQ), and carousel (Testimonials). Strip default border-radius and Vercel look. Make them flat, border-white/10.
LAYOUT: Use pure HTML/Tailwind for bento grids. Do not use Shadcn 'Card' wrapper for asymmetrical sections, use raw divs.
COLOR: Never use pure black #000000. Use the provided tinted background #050505.
NO PLACEHOLDERS: Use only the image URLs provided in this JSON.
CONTACT FORM: Since it says 'sends to Gmail', mock this action with an API route or client-side mock that shows a success Toast notification.
